headline: TransDigm Group (TDG) On Rising Earnings Expectations And What That Means For Valuation
summary: TransDigm Group (TDG) is back in focus after analyst reports highlighted its pattern of beating quarterly earnings estimates, along with a recent upgrade tied to higher earnings expectations and raised FY2026 net sales and GAAP EPS guidance. See our latest analysis for TransDigm Group. Recent enthusiasm around TransDigm Group’s earnings momentum comes after a 30 day share price return of 7.34% and a 90 day share price gain of 9%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 7.13% and the...
